induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp [partialSums]
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp [partialSums_cons, flatten_cons, findIdx_cons]
    split <;> rename_i h
    · simp [h, findIdx_cons]
    · have h₁ : ∀ {xs x}, findIdx (· > i) (xs.map (x + ·)) = findIdx (· > i - x) xs := by
        intro xs x; induction xs generalizing i <;> (simp [findIdx_cons]; omega)
      have h₂ : 0 < findIdx (· > i - l.length) (map length L).partialSums := by
        simp [findIdx_cons]; split <;> omega
      simp [h, h₁, h₂, ih]

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp [partialSums, findIdx_cons]
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, take_append]
    if h : i < l.length then
      have : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) = 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, h]
      simp [this, h]
    else
      have : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) =
          (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i - l.length) + 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons]
        congr; funext x; simp; omega
      simp [this, ih, h]
      omega

  | nil => simp [partialSums]
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, findIdx_map, Function.comp_def]
